zh.Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia於1017年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根時，她的父親Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie23歲，母親Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen29歲。她和Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1093年1月21日在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯蒙特貝利亞德享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia于1017年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根时，她的父亲Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie23岁，母亲Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen29岁。她和Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1093年1月21日在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯蒙特貝利亞德享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Haute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Gerhard.

German (Bavaria-Austria): metonymic occupational name for a toll collector or customs official, from maut ‘toll payment’, or a habitational name from a place called after a toll station like Hohen-Maut in Austria.
South German (Swabia): from Maude, a nickname for a grumpy person.

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

variants.name: Lorrayne
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia was born in 1017, in Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire, her father, Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie, was 23 and her mother, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, was 29. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson. She died on 21 January 1093, in Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia est née en 1017, à Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1093, à Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia 1017 in Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie 23 und ihre Mutter Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen 29. Sie hatte mit Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Januar 1093 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia è nata il nel 1017 nel Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, sua padre, Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson. Morì il 21 gennaio 1093, nel Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingiaが1017年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンで生まれた時，父Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingieは23歳，母Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringenは29歳であった。彼女はLouis de Montbéliard-Moussonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1093年1月21日にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズモントブeリアルドで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia(이)가 1017년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1093년 1월 21일 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 몽브e리아르드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.between 29 August 1071 and 29 August 107: de 29 de agosto de 1071 a 29 de agosto de 1076
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia nasceu em 1017, em Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1093, em Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie de Haute Lorraine de Lotharingia родилась в 1017 г. в местности лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, её отцу по имени Frédéric II de Lorraine duc de Haute-Lotharingie было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson. Она умерла 21 января 1093 г. в местности монтбeлярд, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Louis de Montbéliard-Mousson. Murió el 21 de enero de 1093, en Montbéliard, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 76 años.
